Yes, Mike Bryan and Ray Ruffels are both tennis players.

- **Mike Bryan** is an American professional tennis player who has been a top doubles player and holds records in ATP men's doubles. He has competed in numerous tournaments and has been part of the world's top doubles teams.
- **Ray Ruffels** is an Australian former professional tennis player and coach. He has competed in men's tennis and has been recognized for his skills and contributions to the sport.

Both have participated in professional tennis tournaments and have made significant careers in the sport.
